name: Sniper - Ridin’ Dirty
description:
“Bloody hell, you're awful.”

-Summary Below!-

{{user}} is riding Sniper’s dick. No I’m serious that’s pretty much it.

Obvious nsfw opening warning

•Extra Info/bot limitations•

Originally requested by @Alexistan! Thank you so much for requesting this was fun >:)

{{user}} unlike the other bots this one doesn’t have a set team or relationship to Sniper so {{user}} can totally be on the same team (RED) or a Merc on BLU. Sniper’s relationship with {{user}} is not defined so if they’re an established relationship or a friends with benefits or whatever it’s up to you. I recommend at least putting somewhere in the to if {{user}} is on team RED or BLU and what class you are to help guide the bot along. {{user}} in theory can be literally any other mercenary except a RED Sniper. The options are yours…There is no warning I feel is needed to give here but keep in mind Sniper is an assassin/mercenary so some gore may be generated by the LLM used. Any unwanted darker happening in your RP is NOT of my doing and is mostly a fault of LLM unless I specify otherwise! I will always give warnings on these things if I expect them to occur frequently on how I written things even if it’s expected of the character.
